programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Elimination Challenge – Diminishing Pantry
programme.desc: The losing team from the latest challenge now face off over three rounds.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Oyster Challenge
programme.desc: The Top 12 duos shuck and prepare oysters three ways in the Bay of Islands.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Duke Of Marlborough Hotel
programme.desc: The Bottom 6 duos cook dinner for the Top 6 duos and 185 other guests at The Duke Of Marlborough Hotel.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Daniel Wilson / Kiwi Style Bouillabaisse
programme.desc: The Top 11 duos cook a Kiwi spin on a classic French fish stew for guest chef Daniel Wilson.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - 1 Fish, 2 Dish
programme.desc: The Top1 0 duos each prepare and cook two dishes from a whole fish.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - FISH
programme.desc: Masterchef judges Josh Emett and Ray McVinnie cook two simple but elegant fish dishes.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Pressure Test 3
programme.desc: Noelene joins Neha and Vern in a Pressure Test set by Kirsten Tibbles: the chocolate Lourous Cake.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Elimination Challenge 13
programme.desc: The remaining 6 chefs are asked to cook their dreams for the future, and present it on a plate.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Mystery Box Challenge
programme.desc: It's power apron week on MasterChef Australia.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Mystery Box Challenge
programme.desc: The top eight contestants take a trip down memory lane.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Elimination Challenge
programme.desc: Power Week. The elimination challenge will take place over two rounds.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Marco Pierre White Team Challenge
programme.desc: As promised, Marco Pierre White returns to see how far the contestants have come.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Elimination Challenge: Time Auction
programme.desc: The contestants facing elimination will take part in a time auction.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - EP760
programme.desc: While one contestant has safely made it through to the semi-final, the remaining three are fighting it out to stay in the competition in a pressure test that will stretch them to their limits.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Immunity Challenge
programme.desc: An immunity challenge with a twist.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - EP715
programme.desc: The three contestants with the least impressive dishes from the previous invention test face off in the pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Pressure Test
programme.desc: The three contestants from the invention test will cook off in a pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Elimination Challenge: Rick Stein
programme.desc: The judges reveal that the challenge is all about fish.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Elimination Challenge
programme.desc: Power Week. The elimination challenge will take place over two rounds.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Off-site Challenge: Circa: The Prince
programme.desc: The judges reveal the contestants will be preparing a seven-course degustation menu for 40 diners.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - No Rules Challenge
programme.desc: In this challenge the contestants can choose their own cuisine and whether it's sweet or savoury.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Pressure Test: Cook-Along
programme.desc: With no recipe and no clock, three contestants must cook along with Marco Pierre White

programme.title: Fear Factor USA - Leeches and Tear Gas
programme.desc: In each pulse-racing Fear Factor episode, contestants recruited across the country battle in extreme stunts.

programme.title: Fear Factor USA - EP2
programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.title: Fear Factor USA - EP2
programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - The Bees Are So Angry
programme.desc: Five teams of two compete for $100,000 dollars on a five stunt, 2 hour spectacular.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Leeches & Shaved Heads & Tear Gas
programme.desc: In a special 2 hour Fear Factor five teams of 2 are bungeed off a cliff while tied under a helicopter.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Snake Bite
programme.desc: Four couples compete for a grand prize of $50,000.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Broken Hearts & Blood Baths
programme.desc: Four teams of exes must deal with 3 stunts and each other.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Scorpion Tales
programme.desc: Four teams of family members compete for $50,000 as they careen into a quarry full of live ammunition.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Hee Haw! Hee Haw!
programme.desc: Four sets of twins compete for $50,000 as they are electric shocked.

programme.desc: In a special 2 hour Fear Factor five teams of 2 are bungeed off a cliff while tied under a helicopter.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Mystery Box Challenge: Heston Blumenthal & Invention Test
programme.desc: Today's mystery box challenge has been set by the great Heston Blumenthal.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Baking Bonanza
programme.desc: Guest chef Sean Armstrong from Auckland bakery Loaf joins MasterChef judges to bake three delicious desserts.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Around the World
programme.desc: Guest chef Sergio Maglione from Toto restaurant joins MasterChef judges to cook dishes from around the world.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Dolphin Island
programme.desc: The Top Eight contestants face an invention test at Dolphin Island resort in Fiji.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Cooking With Fire
programme.desc: Guest chef Michel Louws joins MasterChef judges to cook three barbecue dishes at Dolphin Island resort in Fiji.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Semi-Finals Service Challenge
programme.desc: It is the semi-final of MasterChef Australia 2018.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Pressure Test: Paul Carmichael's Bajan Fish Fry
programme.desc: The contestants have three hours and 45 minutes to recreate Paul Carmichael's Bajan fish fry.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Service Challenge: Starlight Children's Foundation
programme.desc: Guest chef Curtis Stone leads the service challenge at the Starlight Children's Foundation charity lunch.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Offsite Challenge: Taxi Kitchen
programme.desc: The off-site challenge sees the contestants split into teams to cook a three-course, British-inspired menu.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Offsite Challenge: Asian
programme.desc: In an Asian cuisine challenge, the contestants, in four teams must cook an Asian dish for 200 hungry fans.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Elimination Challenge: Risotto
programme.desc: Each contestant has one hour to cook next-level risotto.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Mystery Box Challenge & Invention Test
programme.desc: In Power Apron week, the contestant holding the apron will have a big advantage in the Mystery Box challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Mystery Box Challenge: Second Chances
programme.desc: This challenge will present the biggest shock in the competition so far. Only the most courageous will win.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Offsite Challenge: Wedding Anniversary at Ascot House
programme.desc: The contestants arrive at Melbourne to celebrate a diamond jubilee wedding anniversary with no food.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Pressure Test: White Heat
programme.desc: Marco Pierre White sets the pressure test challenge from his iconic cookbook, White Heat.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Offsite Challenge
programme.desc: In the off-site challenge, Heston sets the task for the five contestants cooking.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Power Apron Mystery Box Challenge
programme.desc: In an intense Mystery Box challenge, the winning team from the service challenge play off for the power apron.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - St Crispin Pressure Test
programme.desc: Three contestants must recreate a dish made by the co-head chefs from Melbourne restaurant Saint Crispin.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Elimination Challenge
programme.desc: The losing team from the off-site challenge go head-to-head to keep their place in the competition.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - Pressure Test: Vikas Khanna
programme.desc: In the Pressure Test Challenge, the contestants work with chef and host of MasterChef India, Vikas Khanna.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 06 - MasterChef 2014 Finale
programme.desc: The stakes are high as the three remaining contestants fight for a place in the finale.

programme.desc: Four couples compete for a grand prize of $50,000.
